About Me

A Young Builder
Changing the Game

I'm Oke Adefemi Vincent, a 16-year-old student developer from Nigeria with an obsession for building technology that actually matters. I believe the future of Africa runs through education — and I'm writing that future in code.

I founded Nexus AI Study Tool to prove that powerful, AI-driven learning experiences don't have to be out of reach for Nigerian students. Every line I write is a step toward a smarter, more equitable educational system.

Futurist at heart. I'm deeply fascinated by artificial intelligence, interface design, and how emerging technology reshapes human potential. When I'm not building, I'm learning — and when I'm learning, I'm already thinking about what to build next.

🤖 AI Enthusiast 🚀 Tech Founder 🎓 Student Dev 💡 Innovator 🌍 Pan-African Vision

What I've Built

Projects

★ Featured
AI · EdTech
Nexus AI Study Tool

An intelligent, AI-powered educational platform built to revolutionize how Nigerian students learn. Nexus delivers smart summaries, adaptive quizzes, and personalized study plans — bringing the power of modern AI into the classroom without barriers.
